changelog: AI Oversight Engine — self-learning resell prevention with ResellGuard, LiveVerifier and OrderAnomalyDetector
Universal Item Detail Panel — image + details shown for any selected item across all tabs
Weekly Reprice — live competitor window showing your listing vs top competitor with images
SEO Title Rotation — title word order rotated weekly during reprice for fresh search rankings
Multi-platform manager — TikTok Shop OAuth integration ready, 10+ platforms in framework
Health Monitor — real-time system checks every 5 minutes with one-click fixes
Universal tooltip help system — hover any button or tab for detailed description
Orders: Relist button, sold/refunded stats bar, persistent refunded status across restarts
AI memory: permanent learning storage with 5GB management and backup on reset
notes: First public release. Requires Windows 10 or 11.
